description_long: This object is a rectangular metal canister with a spout, labeled 'Centralia BENZIN für Feuerzeuge' and '125 ml', indicating it is lighter fluid for refilling lighters. The canister is predominantly white with red accents and black text, featuring hazard symbols and safety instructions on the back. The spout is capped with a small, translucent plastic lid. The canister stands upright on a flat, metallic-looking circular base, which appears to be a support or display platform. The surface of the canister is smooth and reflective, typical of thin metal packaging. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with clear labeling and a compact, portable form factor.
description: A rectangular metal canister labeled as lighter fluid, with a capped spout and red-white hazard markings, standing on a flat metallic base.
description_view_0: The back of the canister is visible, showing safety instructions and hazard symbols in black and red on a white background.
description_view_1: The canister is seen from a rear-side angle, revealing the seam and partial label, with the spout and cap visible at the top.
description_view_2: The front of the canister is shown, displaying the 'Centralia BENZIN für Feuerzeuge' label in red and white, with the spout and cap at the top.
description_view_3: A side view of the canister, showing the edge of the label, barcode, and the spout with its cap.
